statement.p: A company received a grant, and decided to spend {{\frac{3}{10}}} of this grant in research and development next year. Out of the money set aside for research and development, {{\frac{8}{9}}} will be used to buy new equipment. What fraction of the grant will be used to buy new equipment?
of the grant will be used to buy new equipment.

solution.p: For this problem, we are trying to find {{\frac{8}{9}}} of {{\frac{3}{10}}}. The word of implies multiplication:
So {{\frac{4}{15}}} of the grant will be used to buy new equipment.
